code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import AdminSection from'../components/AdminSection';import'./AdminReports.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const API_BASE_URL=process.env.REACT_APP_API_BASE_URL;const AdminReports=()=>{const[reports,setReports]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState('');useEffect(()=>{const fetchReports=async()=>{try{const response=await fetch("".concat(API_BASE_URL,"/reports"));if(!response.ok)throw new Error('Failed to fetch reports');const data=await response.json();setReports(data);}catch(err){setError(err.message);}finally{setLoading(false);}};fetchReports();},[]);return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AdminSection,{title:"Reports",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"admin-reports-list",children:[loading&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"Loading..."}),error&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"error",children:error}),!loading&&!error&&reports.length===0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{children:"No reports found."}),!loading&&!error&&reports.length>0&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("table",{className:"admin-reports-table",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Report Name"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Date"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Type"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Status"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:reports.map(r=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:r.name||r.report_name}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:r.date||'-'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:r.type||'-'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:r.status||'-'})]},r.id))})]})]})});};export default AdminReports;
